Finance Gateway

API Documentation

HomeOverviewGetting StartedAuthenticationTransactionsCustomersSubscriptionsSplit PaymentsWebhooksBalance & LedgerSettlementsTransfersDisputesCard TokensKYC VerificationCompliance & AML3D SecureAPI Playground

Transactions

Initialize, verify, charge, and refund payments across multiple channels.

Payment Channels

Card
Bank Transfer
USSD
Mobile Money
QR
Direct Debit

Endpoints

POST
/transactions/initialize

Initialize a new payment

GET
/transactions/{reference}

Verify transaction status

POST
/transactions/charge

Charge a card directly

POST
/transactions/charge/bank

Charge via bank transfer

POST
/transactions/charge/ussd

Charge via USSD

POST
/transactions/{reference}/refund

Refund a transaction

GET
/transactions

List transactions

Initialize a Payment

POST /transactions/initialize
1curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/v1/transactions/initialize \
2  -H "Authorization: Bearer sk_test_..." \
3  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
4  -d '{
5    "email": "customer@example.com",
6    "amount": 5000.00,
7    "currency": "NGN",
8    "callbackUrl": "https://yourapp.com/verify"
9  }'

Charge a Card

POST /transactions/charge
1curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/v1/transactions/charge \
2  -H "Authorization: Bearer sk_test_..." \
3  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
4  -d '{
5    "email": "customer@example.com",
6    "amount": 5000.00,
7    "card": {
8      "number": "4084084084084081",
9      "cvv": "123",
10      "expiryMonth": "12",
11      "expiryYear": "2025",
12      "pin": "1234"
13    }
14  }'

Verify Transaction

GET /transactions/{reference}
1curl http://localhost:8080/api/v1/transactions/REF-001 \
2  -H "Authorization: Bearer sk_test_..."

Refund

POST /transactions/{reference}/refund
1curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/v1/transactions/REF-001/refund \
2  -H "Authorization: Bearer sk_test_..." \
3  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
4  -d '{
5    "amount": 2500.00,
6    "reason": "Customer requested partial refund"
7  }'
